description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and large, rectangular windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The front features a landscaped garden, a central entry door, and a small patio area. The rear of the house opens onto a spacious backyard with a treehouse built around a mature tree, a swing set, and a sandbox, creating a family-friendly outdoor space. The house has multiple balconies and terraces, some with outdoor seating and planters, enhancing its connection to the surrounding greenery. The exterior is predominantly white with accents of gray and muted red, and the design emphasizes clean lines and open spaces. Solar panels are visible on the roof, indicating an eco-friendly approach.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, large windows, and multiple terraces, featuring a landscaped front garden and a backyard with a treehouse and play area.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, landscaped garden, and a small patio with planters.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, treehouse, swing set, sandbox, and outdoor seating areas.
description_view_2: Backyard-focused view with a clear look at the treehouse, play equipment, and green lawn.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the house's large windows, solar panels, and the transition between the front and backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small steps, landscaped garden, and a modest patio area with planters
